summary: Excellent soundboard capture with clean, hot performance featuring standout Bertha, Tennessee Jed and Big Railroad Blues – though the second set is missing from this release.
review: The Miller‑salvaged recording is praised for its crystal‑clear, well‑balanced sound that outshines other sources. Listeners love the first‑set energy, especially Bertha, Tennessee Jed and Big Railroad Blues, but note that the excellent second set isn’t present in this file.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical performance highlighted by several fans combined with an excellent soundboard recording; only a minor drawback is the missing second‑set material.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clean, crisp mix praised as great/superb and better than other sources; no major artifacts mentioned but reviewers note lack of track labels.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as hot and enjoyable, giving a vivid snapshot of the emerging Keith Godchaux/Pigpen era; however, the second set is absent from this release, leaving the concert incomplete.
